user.title: Connect to your Teltonika router
user.description: Enter the details for your Teltonika router. The router must be reachable from Home Assistant.

data_description.host: e.g. 192.168.1.1 — http:// will be added automatically
data_description.modem: Usually '1-1' for single-modem devices like the RUTX11. SSH in and run: cat /etc/board.json | jsonfilter -e '@.modems[0].id'
data_description.verify_ssl: Leave off for most routers (they use self-signed certificates)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address and that the router is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details (search for 'teltonika').

test_sms.title: Send a test SMS
test_sms.description: Enter a phone number to send a test message to. This will use your configured router immediately.

reconfigure.title: Update router settings
reconfigure.description: Update your router connection details. Your current values are pre-filled.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
